Name: Eternal Grudge
DevDescription: KO’s self. In return, halves the opponent's ATK and SpATK.

Name: Infernal Flame
DevDescription: Deals damage, {EFFECT_ACCURACY} chance of inflicting Burn.

Name: Wither Away
DevDescription: Deals damage, and then inflicts Panic on both players.

Name: Osteoporosis
DevDescription: Deals damage.

Name: Grave Affliction
DevDescription: If the opposing mon has a status condition, both mons lose half their current HP.

Name: Rock Pull
DevDescription: If the opponent is attempting to switch out, deals heavy damage. Otherwise, deals damage to self.

Name: Pound Ground
DevDescription: Deals damage.

Name: Blow
DevDescription: Deals damage.

Name: Throw Pebble
DevDescription: Deals damage.

Name: Unbounded Strike
DevDescription: Consume 3 Baselight stacks to deal 130 damage at 1 stamina cost. Otherwise, deals 80 damage at 2 stamina cost.

Name: Loop
DevDescription: Sets all stats to +{BOOST_PERCENT_LEVEL_1}/{BOOST_PERCENT_LEVEL_2}/{BOOST_PERCENT_LEVEL_3} based on Baselight level. Does not stack.

Name: Brightback
DevDescription: Deals damage. Consume 1 Baselight stack to heal for {HEAL_DENOM} of damage dealt.

Name: Renormalize
DevDescription: Sets Baselight level to 3. Clears all stat boosts, positive or negative.

Name: Chain Expansion
DevDescription: Sets up battlefield effect with 4 charges, consumed by switch-ins on either side. An enemy switch-in takes damage scaled by its Faith weakness; a friendly switch-in heals {HEAL_DENOM} of max HP.

Name: Initialize
DevDescription: Boosts ATK/SpATK by {ATTACK_BUFF_PERCENT}. Can only be used once each time Inutia is sent out. When Inutia switches out, the bonus is transferred to the next incoming mon.

Name: Big Bite
DevDescription: Deals damage.

Name: Hit And Dip
DevDescription: Deals damage, then swaps out.

Name: Sanctify
DevDescription: Applies Blessed status on a team member.

Name: Triple Think
DevDescription: Boosts SpATK by {SP_ATTACK_BUFF_PERCENT}.

Name: Federal Investigation
DevDescription: Deals damage.

Name: Negative Thoughts
DevDescription: Deals damage, {EFFECT_ACCURACY} chance to cause Panic.

Name: Infinite Love
DevDescription: Deals damage, {EFFECT_ACCURACY} chance to cause Sleep.

Name: Foul Language
DevDescription: Deals damage. Half of the damage done is taken as recoil.

Name: Chill Out
DevDescription: Inflicts Frostbite on the opponent.

Name: Deadlift
DevDescription: Increases ATK and DEF by {ATTACK_BUFF_PERCENT}.

Name: Deep Freeze
DevDescription: If the target has Frostbite, consumes Frostbite and does double damage (the target's SpATK returns to normal).

Name: Pistol Squat
DevDescription: Deals damage, then forces the enemy mon to switch to a random living teammate.

Name: Gachachacha
DevDescription: Uniformly random power from 0 to 200. Small chance (about 2% each) that the roll instead becomes a max-HP-sized attack on Sofabbi itself, or on the opponent; both run through the normal damage formula, so they can be survived.

Name: Guest Feature
DevDescription: Attack Type is set to be the first Type of another selected party member.

Name: Unexpected Carrot
DevDescription: Deals damage.

Name: Snack Break
DevDescription: Heal for {DEFAULT_HEAL_DENOM} of health. Effectiveness reduces by half each time, until a min of 6.6%.

Name: Electrocute
DevDescription: Deals damage, {EFFECT_ACCURACY} chance to cause Zap. A Zapped mon skips its next turn.

Name: Round Trip
DevDescription: Deals damage, then switches out.

Name: Mega Star Blast
DevDescription: If used during Overclock, clears Overclock and accuracy is 100%. Otherwise accuracy is 60%. Deals damage, {ZAP_ACCURACY} chance to inflict Zap.

Name: Dual Shock
DevDescription: Deals damage and inflicts Zap on self. Overclocks your team

Name: Honey Bribe
DevDescription: Heals self by {DEFAULT_HEAL_DENOM} of max HP and the opponent by 25% of max HP (each subsequent use cuts the healing in half). Lowers opponent SpDEF by {SP_DEF_PERCENT} until they switch out.

Name: Set Ablaze
DevDescription: Deals damage, {EFFECT_ACCURACY} chance of Burn.

Name: Heat Beacon
DevDescription: +1 priority to next turn's move. Inflicts Burn.

Name: Q5
DevDescription: Deals 150 damage at the start of the 5th round after casting, to whichever enemy is active then.

Name: Volatile Punch
DevDescription: Deals damage. 25% chance of Burn and 25% chance of Frostbite.

Name: Gilded Recovery
DevDescription: Heals a target friendly mon (Aurox included) from a status condition. If successful, Aurox heals {HEAL_PERCENT} of max HP and the target gains +1 stamina (this can exceed the stamina maximum). If the target has no status, the cast does nothing but still costs stamina.

Name: Iron Wall
DevDescription: Until Aurox switches out, regenerate {HEAL_PERCENT} of all damage taken, its own recoil included. When activated for the first time each switch-in, Aurox heals {INITIAL_HEAL_PERCENT} of max HP.

Name: Bull Rush
DevDescription: Deals damage. Also deals {SELF_DAMAGE_PERCENT} of max HP to self.

Name: Contagious Slumber
DevDescription: Inflicts Sleep on self and opponent.

Name: Vital Siphon
DevDescription: Deals damage, {STAMINA_STEAL_PERCENT} chance to steal 1 stamina from opponent.

Name: Somniphobia
DevDescription: For 4 rounds, any opposing mon that gains stamina takes {DAMAGE_DENOM:frac} of its max HP per stack as damage. Repeated casts while active increase the damage but do not reset the cooldown.

Name: Night Terrors
DevDescription: Gain a Terror stack. Deals damage and costs stamina at end of turn for each Terror stack. Deals extra damage if opponent is alseep.

Name: Invoke Taboo
DevDescription: Taboos the opponent's last used move. Until they switch out, if they use that move again they fall asleep.

Name: Bubble Bop
DevDescription: Hits twice. Each hit deals 50 base power.

Name: Sneak Attack
DevDescription: Hits any opponent mon (even non-active). Can only be used once per switch-in.

Name: Nine Nine Nine
DevDescription: Sets crit rate to 90% on the next turn for all moves.

Name: Overflow
DevDescription: Deals damage.

Name: Hard Reset
DevDescription: The next time your team rests, the resting mon gains +1 stamina, heals {HP_DENOM} max HP, and is swapped out. The next time your opponent rests, their mon loses 1 stamina, takes {HP_DENOM} max HP damage, and also swaps out.

Name: Scary Numbers
DevDescription: Deals damage, {EFFECT_ACCURACY} chance to inflict Panic.

Name: Chronoffense
DevDescription: First use boosts defenses. Second use deals damage based on how much time has passed, and then resets.

Name: Modal Bolt
DevDescription: Choose between Fire, Ice, or Lightning each use. Each mode is usable once, and applies its corresponding status (Burn / Frostbite / Zap) at {EFFECT_ACCURACY} chance.
